tagline: Crystal Clear Pools. Professional Care. Every Time.

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Family-Level
Care
hero.subheadline: Most pool companies treat you like a number. Pool Pro's treats you like a neighbor. We're the family-owned service Central and North Texas trusts for honest communication, photo-documented visits, and pools that stay crystal clear year-round.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly skimming to complete pool transformations, Pool Pro's handles it all so you can enjoy your backyard without the hassle.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough cleaning, chemical balancing, filter checks, and equipment inspections every week. You'll get a photo report after each visit so you always know your pool's status.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Diagnostics
cards.description: Pumps, motors, heaters, filters, and automation systems expertly diagnosed and repaired. Our licensed technicians get your pool equipment running right the first time.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing
cards.description: Cracked or stained plaster? We restore your pool's interior finish to like-new condition with durable materials built to handle the Texas heat for years to come.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Complete pool transformations including tile upgrades, coping replacement, deck resurfacing, and feature additions that turn aging pools into backyard showpieces.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precision chemical balancing that eliminates algae, cloudiness, and pH problems. Safe, healthy water that's gentle on skin and keeps your equipment protected.

cards.title: Seasonal & One-Time Cleanups
cards.description: Green pool recoveries, post-storm cleanups, and seasonal deep-cleans that bring neglected pools back to sparkling condition fast — often within a single visit.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Stress-Free Pool

steps.title: Text or Call for a Free Quote
steps.description: Reach out by phone or text at (972) 590-8161. We'll discuss your pool's needs and schedule a convenient time to assess your setup — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Show Up & Deliver Results
steps.description: Our trained technicians arrive on schedule with everything needed to service your pool. After each visit, you receive a photo report documenting exactly what was done.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Crystal Clear Pool
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool is professionally maintained week after week. If anything ever falls short of perfect, we come back and make it right — guaranteed.

about.label: Why DFW Trusts Pool Pro's
about.headline: Family-Owned Means Every Pool Gets Personal Attention
about.description: Pool Pro's was built on a belief that pool service should feel personal. As a family-owned business serving Central and North Texas, we take pride in building real relationships with our customers — not just checking boxes on a route sheet. Every technician is licensed, trained, and backed by our commitment to honest communication and documented results you can see after every single visit.

features.title: Photo-Documented Service
features.description: After every visit you receive a photo report showing your pool's condition. Full transparency means you always know exactly what was done and how your pool looks.

features.title: No Contracts Required
features.description: We earn your trust through results, not legal paperwork. Stay because you're happy, not because you're locked in. Cancel anytime with zero fees.

features.title: Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite
features.description: Voted a Nextdoor Favorite by the community and recognized by HomeAdvisor with Elite Service status. Real neighbors recommending real results.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool's needs. Adjust or cancel anytime — we keep things simple because that's how it should be.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever less than thrilled with a service visit, call or text us and we'll return to make it right at no extra charge. Period. We built Pool Pro's on honesty and personal accountability — your satisfaction isn't just a promise, it's how we've earned every single one of our reviews. That's the Pool Pro's difference.

faqs.question: How soon can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent issues like equipment failures or green pools, reach out by text or call and we'll do our best to get there the same week.

faqs.question: Do I get updates after each service visit?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. After every single visit, you receive a photo report documenting your pool's condition and what work was performed. You'll always know exactly what's happening with your pool.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Central and North Texas including the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex, Lewisville, Waco, and surrounding communities. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just text us and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and trained?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Pool Pro's technician is licensed, professionally trained, and equipped to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex equipment diagnostics and pool remodeling projects.

faqs.question: What if I need to cancel or pause service?
faqs.answer: No problem at all. We don't use contracts, so you can pause or cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties. Many customers pause during winter months and restart in spring — we make it easy.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: We've been with Pool Pro's for seven years and wouldn't dream of switching. They do quality work with both cleaning and repairs, always show up on time, and the photo updates give me total peace of mind. Best pool service in DFW.

testimonials.name: David & Karen L.
testimonials.text: Our pool was in rough shape after years of neglect. Pool Pro's handled the entire resurfacing and it looks brand new. Blake and his team were communicative, professional, and finished ahead of schedule. Couldn't be happier.

testimonials.name: Jason R.
testimonials.text: The team is always courteous, shows up on time with a smile, and does a fantastic job maintaining our pool. When our pump went out they diagnosed and fixed it fast. They genuinely care about doing great work.

contact.subtitle: Text or call for a free, no-pressure quote. No contracts, no fine print — just honest, family-owned pool care backed by our 100% satisfaction guarantee.
